overview: Frontend Engineers are expected to showcase strong UI/UX implementation skills, performance optimization, and deep knowledge of frameworks like React, Vue, or Angular.

summaryTips: Highlight your years of experience, primary tech stack, and a major achievement.
experienceTips: Use the XYZ formula: 'Accomplished [X] as measured by [Y], by doing [Z]'.
Quantify your impact (e.g., 'Improved load time by 40%').
Mention the specific technologies used in each bullet point.
projectTips: Link to live demos or GitHub repositories.
Highlight complex technical challenges you solved (e.g., complex state, custom hooks, animations).

dos: Do tailor your skills section to the job description.
Do include a link to your portfolio or GitHub.
donts: Don't list basic skills like 'HTML/CSS' alone, focus on advanced concepts.
Don't use weak verbs like 'Helped' or 'Worked on'.
Don't include a photo unless in a specific geography that expects it.
